creator: andreas.sommer87@googlemail.com
text:
Created attachment 197393
doc patch

First-time doc submission, containing:
- The "Submitting Documentation" guide is directly available on https://www.freebsd.org/docproj/ and now links to the full primer on how to work on documentation
- Small rewording

igor seems fine with my changes, but not with all the rest of the document. Not sure if anyone takes care to fix those warnings or whether they should be fixed when stumbling over them?!
